hotelImages.caption: Superior Pool View King - Balcony - Guestroom

address.address1: , Anoe Itam, Kec. Sukajaya Mata Ie Resort

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.2/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 10.0/10 on value for money

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Physical distancing of at least 1 meter
Temperature check for guests and staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Salam dari Msia,maaf lambat bagi feedback.Resort yang sangat selesa,bersih,nyaman,tenang dan sangat sesuai untuk bawa family seperti anak kecil,orang tua & ll.Staff yang friendly & baik semuanya.Hidangan sarapan pagi yang sedap dan memuaskan 👍🏻.Bilik tidur dan bilik air yang selesa dan besar.Sangat berpuas hati.Insyaallah kalau rezeki kesana lagi,maybe akan repeat resort ini lagi ya.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Beautiful resort, big, clean swiming pool lovely staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The staff is friendly, the bedroom is clean, the bathroom is clean, there is hot and cold water, there is a bedside lamp, and there are toiletries. It's all complete. 👍🏻
comments.originalComment: staf nya ramah semua, kamar tidur bersih, kamar mandi bersih, ada air panas dingin, ada lampu tidur, ada perlengkapan mandi. lengkap pokoknya👍🏻
